fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Maryland SLP License Requirements — Fees, Board Contact & How to Apply (2026)
seo.description: Complete guide to Maryland speech-language pathologist licensing. Board fees, Praxis requirements, and telepractice rules for 2026.
seo.keywords: Maryland SLP license, speech-language pathologist Maryland, Maryland speech therapy license

board.name: Board of Examiners for Audiologists, Hearing Aid Dispensers, Speech-Language Pathologists, and Music Therapists

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Maryland.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Earn a Master's Degree in SLP
steps.description: Complete a master's degree from a CAA-accredited program.

steps.title: Pass the Praxis Examination
steps.description: Achieve a passing score on Praxis (test code 5331, score 162).

steps.title: Complete Clinical Fellowship
steps.description: Complete 36 weeks of supervised clinical practice (1,260 hours).

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Submit application with fees to the Board.

telepractice_text: Maryland permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Maryland issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Maryland is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Maryland SLP license cost?
Is Maryland part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Maryland allow telepractice for SLPs?
